# Ziyanali Saiyed | Developer Portfolio

A minimalistic, fast, and responsive personal portfolio website built with [Jekyll](https://jekyllrb.com/). 

## Features

- **Jekyll-Powered:** Static site generation for maximum performance and easy deployment.
- **Minimalist Design:** Clean UI using system fonts and handwritten accents.
- **Dark/Light Mode:** Seamless theme toggling using CSS variables.
- **Responsive Layouts:** CSS Grid layouts that work beautifully on any device.
- **Interactive Elements:** Engaging hover effects and CSS-based tooltips.

## Prerequisites

Before you begin, ensure you have the following installed:
- [Ruby](https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/downloads/) (>= 2.5.0)
- [Bundler](https://bundler.io/) (`gem install bundler`)

## Local Setup

1. **Clone the repository:**
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/iamziyan/portfolio.git
   cd portfolio
   ```

2. **Install dependencies:**
   ```bash
   bundle install
   ```

3. **Run the Jekyll server:**
   ```bash
   bundle exec jekyll serve
   ```

4. **View the site:**
   Open [http://localhost:4000](http://localhost:4000) (or whichever port the server starts on) in your browser.

## Customization

- **Site Meta Data:** Edit the `_config.yml` file to change the site title, description, and author details.
- **Styles & Colors:** Edit `_sass/_variables.scss` to change the main branding colors and text colors, and `_sass/_main.scss` for layout logic.
- **Pages:** Edit any of the HTML layout files in `_pages/` (like `about.html`, `uses.html`, `now.html`).
- **Assets:** Replace placeholder images in `assets/images/`.
